title: Abilities Galore
body:
This mod contains ~60 powers with 4 rarities in order from worst to best it goes common, epic, legendary, and eldritch. Upon joining the game you will recieve a 90% common or 10% epic power which can be changed by using power crystals. All rarities have a corresponding power crystal which are crafted by using the prior crystal except common as it has no prior crystal instead using end crystals and such. There is also an additional crystal called weeping power crystal which is currently unobtainable but has the highest chance for an eldritch power. 

The mod is still in its early stages with most likely quite a few bugs and stuff so I may release more updates.


<details>
<summary>Common Powers</summary>

Commmon powers are mostly funny or mildy useful like slightly increasing your speed or shooting an arrow all the way to spamming 50 chicken eggs. Common powers are most likely what youll spawn with so expect something silly and hope for something useful.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Epic Powers</summary>

Right above common powers are epic powers which are all useful in at least a few scenarios all the way to really good. You have a small change to spawn with an epic power so hope you do! Theyt can range from shooting 20 arrows that deal quite a bit of damage to leaping into the sun all the way to creating a freezig blizzard. 

</details>


<details>
<summary>Legendary Powers</summary>

Almost the best are legendary powers, these are very useful and can change gameplay entirely, they are very difficult to get and have very large gameplay implications and applications. Some of my favorites are toggleable friction which is really op on the nether roof or with frost walker, railgun which allows you to shoot a super fast arrow blast or summon an arrow airstrike, and altar which forces players to look at you and catch on fire.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Eldritch Powers</summary>

Finally the best of the best. Eldritch powers have a special mechanic where only one player can have each eldritch power at a time. If someone has an eldritch power you can still get one but they wont be the same. There is ~8 eldritch powers that you can get and they all  have insane damage output for the most part. My 3 favorites are Warden which shoots a sonic boom that deals true damage and has echolocation that buffs you and gives nearby entities glowing, the Immovable Object which freezes you in place but gives resistance, regen, and glowing, and finally my most favorite Intangibility which allows you to phase through blocks then release and you will pop out taking no fall damage or phase nearby entities into the ground and suffocate/trap them. Overall there are insane powers that allow for crazy new strategies.

</details>

Overall this mod was very fun to make and if you have any ideas feel free to let me know on discord at peanutmc

Thanks for reading!
